Package microui.core.style.theme

package microui.core.style.theme
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    microui.core.style
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractTheme
    Abstract base class for defining color themes in the MicroUI framework.
    ThemeBlack
    Dark theme implementation with black/dark gray color scheme and lerped effects.
    ThemeGlass
    Glass/transparent theme implementation with subtle animations and translucent effects.
    ThemeGray
    Gray theme implementation with a monochromatic color scheme.
    ThemeManager
    Manager for handling theme selection and retrieval in the MicroUI framework.
    ThemeWhite
    Light theme implementation with a white/gray color scheme and lerp effects.
